# Creator Space Fort Wayne

> Fort Wayne, Indiana's creative community platform. A free platform connecting local creators — videographers, photographers, designers, musicians, developers, audio engineers, animators, and more.

## What is Creator Space Fort Wayne?

Creator Space Fort Wayne is a community platform for creative professionals in Fort Wayne, Indiana. Beyond a directory, it offers collaboration tools, monthly challenges, a skills exchange, a public leaderboard, event management, and a business inquiry system for hiring local creators.

## Key Facts

- Location: Fort Wayne, Indiana, USA
- Website: https://creatorspacefw.com
- Cost: Free to join, free to use
- Directory: https://creatorspacefw.com/directory
- Collaborate: https://creatorspacefw.com/collaborate
- Challenges: https://creatorspacefw.com/challenges
- Leaderboard: https://creatorspacefw.com/leaderboard
- Skills Exchange: https://creatorspacefw.com/learn
- Hire a Creator: https://creatorspacefw.com/hire
- Spotlight: https://creatorspacefw.com/spotlight
- Categories: Video, Photo, Editor, VFX, Code, Music, Aerial, Design, Writing, Audio Engineering, Animation, Marketing, Business

## Features

- Creator Directory: Browse 140+ local creators by skill, name, or company
- Collaboration Board: Post project needs or offer your skills to other creators
- Monthly Challenges: Accept creative challenges with deadlines, rules, and social hashtags
- Skills Exchange: Teach what you know, learn what you don't — find matching creators
- Leaderboard: Earn points for community participation, see top creators
- Creator Spotlight: Monthly featured creator selected from the leaderboard
- Business Inquiries: Businesses can submit hire requests, admins route to matching creators
- Event Management: RSVP to meetups with waitlist support and iPad check-in
- Equipment & Resources: Creators list available gear and studio space on their profiles

## Who is this for?

- Creative professionals in the Fort Wayne area looking to network
- Businesses in Fort Wayne looking to hire local creative talent
- Anyone interested in Fort Wayne's creative community
- Creators looking for collaborators on projects

## How to join

Sign up free at https://creatorspacefw.com/auth/signup to claim your spot. Add your skills, bio, portfolio, social links, and equipment to your profile.

## Contact

Email: hello@creatorspacefw.com
